description: Generic presentation frame emitted by a stage director: registered character/cue tokens, an optional catalog asset call, and a type-tagged opaque card envelope. App protocols may embed this shape and extend it with app-specific fields declared in their own contract (see protocol_v1.json stage_frame.app_extension_fields). Token VALUES (states, fx, props, voice tags, asset ids) and card payload contracts are app-registered; this schema owns only the slots.

card_envelope.rule: type selects an app-registered card contract; data is validated by the app, never by the generic layer

asset_call.rule: must equal the registered catalog entry for asset_id verbatim
